hooks.prompt: Before context compaction, automatically log this session to Notion. Check if .my-ops-config.json exists in the project root. If it does, follow the session-log skill: summarize the conversation, collect changed files (git diff --name-only), recent commits (git log --oneline --since='today'), and lessons learned. Then create a Notion page using the configured settings. If .my-ops-config.json does not exist, skip logging silently.
